title: Injured man arrested for double murder discharged into police custody
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The 49-year-old man arrested in connection with the murder of a man and woman on Saturday 8 November has been discharged from hospital and is expected to appear in the Mossel Bay Magistrate’s Court tomorrow, 11 November.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The 49-year-old man arrested in connection with the murder of a man and woman on Saturday 8 November has been discharged from hospital and is expected to appear in the Mossel Bay Magistrate’s Court tomorrow, 11 November."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"He was taken to hospital on Saturday after he had been found in the KwaNonqaba area with chest wounds, which, according to a previous statement by the Southern Cape Police’s spokesperson, Sergeant Chris Spies, were believed to have been self-inflicted."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Spies said in a statement today, 10 November, that the man had been discharged from hospital yesterday evening, 9 November. He will remain in police custody until his expected court appearance.","html":"Spies said in a statement today, 10 November, that the man had been discharged from hospital yesterday evening, 9 November. He will remain in police custody until his expected court appearance."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Spies previously told Mossel Bay Advertiser that the KwaNonqaba Police had been dispatched to a scene in Mfuleni Street, KwaNonqaba, just after 09:30 on Saturday after some community members had called them to report seeing a man with knife leaving a house in that street.","html":"Spies previously told Mossel Bay Advertiser that the KwaNonqaba Police had been dispatched to a scene in Mfuleni Street, KwaNonqaba, just after 09:30 on Saturday after some community members had called them to report seeing a man with knife leaving a house in that street."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"When the police arrived, they found the body of a 43-year-old man. Emergency medical services declared him dead on the scene.","html":"When the police arrived, they found the body of a 43-year-old man. Emergency medical services declared him dead on the scene."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The police were then called to another house in Bantom Street, where the body of a 46-year-old woman with stab wounds to her neck and arms was found. She, too, was declared dead.","html":"The police were then called to another house in Bantom Street, where the body of a 46-year-old woman with stab wounds to her neck and arms was found. She, too, was declared dead."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The suspect was found shortly afterwards and arrested. He spent the evening in hospital under police guard.Spies said the motive for the two murders is still under investigation.","html":"The suspect was found shortly afterwards and arrested. He spent the evening in hospital under police guard.
Spies said the motive for the two murders is still under investigation."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Previous article: Man under police supervision in hospital after double murder in KwaNonqaba","html":"Previous article: Man under police supervision in hospital after double murder in KwaNonqaba"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Injured man arrested for double murder discharged into police custody
